comment: Stream a model reply into a Telegram message. Call 'stream' repeatedly with the growing 'text' as tokens arrive; pass the returned message_id and the text you last sent back in as message_id / last_sent_text. Set done=true on the final call to drop the cursor. The bot token is read from CORAX_TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN, never passed in input.

input.text: Here is the answer so far with **bold** that renders cleanly
input.last_sent_text: Here is the answer so far
